query:
SELECT 
  id, ticker,
  ROUND(entryPrice, 4) AS entryPrice,
  ROUND(initialSl, 4) AS initialSl,
  ROUND(initialTp, 4) AS initialTp,
  ROUND(exitPrice, 4) AS exitPrice,
  exitReason,
  ROUND((initialSl - entryPrice) / entryPrice * 100, 2) AS sl_pct,
  ROUND((exitPrice - entryPrice) / entryPrice * 100, 3) AS pnl_pct,
  ROUND(realizedPnl, 2) AS realizedPnl,
  units,
  openedAt, closedAt
FROM paperTrades
WHERE ticker = 'USB'
ORDER BY closedAt DESC;
